title: Upon One Who Said She Was Always Young.
content:
You say you're young; but when your teeth are told
    To be but three, black-ey'd, we'll think you old.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon One Who Said She Was Always Young.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
